one_time_description: Write off of old accounts payable (Note 17) - negative adjustment of $87,612 in 2022
economic_notes: Ndeh Limited Partnership engaged in rental, contract work, hotel operations, firefighting and logging. Potential contamination found in High Level Trailer Park with estimated liability of $500,000 to $1,000,000. Settlement Trust established in 2007 related to MacKenzie Valley Pipeline.
notes: Audit is qualified due to the First Nation not preparing a budget as required by Canadian public sector accounting standards. Ndeh Limited Partnership accounted for using modified equity method (GBE). The statement of financial position showing tangible capital assets net book value was not fully extracted from the text. Housing units count estimated from mortgage disclosures (7+8+5+4=24 units mortgaged). Expenses_housing combines Housing ($2,179,344) and Housing Rentals ($477,519). Total government transfers calculated as ISC + FNIHB + ESDC + CMHC + Province of Alberta = 51,960,231 + 6,229,479 + 1,218,020 + 396,957 + 4,437,539 = 64,242,226. OSR = total revenue minus government transfers. Fund schedules line shows negative expense of -$1,133,227. Schedule of remuneration not included in extracted text.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
High ISC dependency (76.63%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
